page_content:
Prerequisite: Minimum grade of C- in BSCI160, BSCI161, and BSCI222 .

BSCI373 Natural History of the Chesapeake Bay (3 Credits) Consideration of the major groups of organisms associated with the Chesapeake Bay and current issues that determine humans’ present and future uses for the Chesapeake and its biota.

Cross-listed with: ENST373.

Credit Only Granted for. BSCI373 or ENST373.
